claim: rfx Simulation.compute_coaxial_line_reflection |Gamma| agrees with an independent MEEP power-flux full-wave coax line to <= 0.063 (mean <= 0.024) across a broad 4-12 GHz band for the short/open (|Gamma|=1) full-reflection calibration terminations; rfx single-TEM-mode recurrence residual <= 0.0037.
claim_scope: broad external full-wave cross-validation of the promoted rfx coaxial_port line reflection API against an independent MEEP power-flux coax LINE over a frequency axis (4-12 GHz) and the short/open full-reflection calibration terminations (|Gamma| = 1); |Gamma| magnitude comparison (reference-plane independent for the lossless line). The matched (|Gamma|=0) and resistive 25/100 ohm (|Gamma|=0.32/0.35) terminations are covered by the exact-analytic broad-E5 envelope (see coax_line_broad_e5_envelope.json) rather than MEEP, because matched is 0-by-construction in a PML-terminated line and a 1-cell MEEP resistive sheet merely re-tests rfx's own resistor stamp (staircase-sensitive).
